# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
 name: default_deny_all   # Policy Name, you can choose any suitable names in your case e.g., 'default' or something more descriptive like below 
 namespace: [namespace-name]    # Namespace for the policy (replace with actual value)    
spec:
 targetSelectors: []                      # Select all services without a specific subset selector if you want to allow access from any service in that namespace. Uncomment this line and provide list of namespaces accordingly  e.g., 'namespace1', '*' or ['default']]   The above will deny everything, so only specify allowed microservices below
 policy:
 - action: ALLOW    # Allows all actions (Read/Write) in the request object for any namespace to access service xxx-service through this rule.  Uncomment these lines and provide list of services as per your requirement e.g., ['default', 'xxx'] or * if you want allow from other namespaces, etc
   subject: "*"       # Apply policy on all subjects in the request object (anyone who is making a request). You can also specify users by ids and organizations here  Uncomment these lines below to apply policies per user/organization. e.g., 'user1', organization-name, ['org2','*']
     resource: "*"      # Apply policy on all resources in the service level context (like endpoints or routes). You can also specify a list of services here  Uncomment these lines below to apply policies per HTTP methods and paths. e.g., 'get', '/path/*' ,['post','/another-path']
